title: 207  Seven perfections to be achieved by chanting Hare Krishna
speaker: HH Stoka Krishna Maharaj

segments.text: So, carefully follow the verses of the Shiksha Ashtaka, one after another, beginning with
the glories of the Sankirtana, the glories of chanting Hare Krishna, the seven perfections
to be achieved by chanting Hare Krishna, the first verse of the Shiksha Ashtaka, seven
perfections, Chetodarpana Marjanam, you can purify your heart of all the dust that is
accumulated over millions of births, all the material, dirty things, they can be cleansed
by chanting Hare Krishna, Bhava Mahadava Vinirvapanam, you can extinguish the fire
of material existence only by chanting Hare Krishna properly.
Bhava Mahadava Vinirvapanam, this material existence cannot be terminated by any other
method except Bhakti.
In Bhakti also, this process of chanting offenselessly the Hare Krishna mantra is the most effective
in our age.
This process has been given to us with blessings by Chaitanya Mahaprabhu.
Second perfection of chanting Hare Krishna.
Extinguish the fire of material existence, the blazing fire of material existence.
Third one, Shreyak Kairava Chandika Aavitaranam.
You can experience the soothing relief due to the benediction of the holy name of Krishna.
The holy name can satisfy all your desires.
Shri Akta.
Shri Akta.
Shri Akta.
Shri Akta.
Shri Akta.
Shri Akta.
Shri Akta.
Shri Akta.
Shri Akta.
Shri Akta.
Shri Akta.
You can experience the complete satisfaction, and you can experience soothing relief because
that hankering and that lamentation under the spell of Maya, it is completely gone and
you experience a different kind of satisfaction, not the kind of material satisfaction.
Vidyavadhu Jeevanam.
then transcendental knowledge is awakened in the heart all the truths
about the spiritual reality are automatically revealed inside the heart
without any separate endeavor for acquiring spiritual knowledge simply by
offenselessly chanting Hare Krishna transcendental knowledge is awakened in the
heart this the fourth perfection of chanting Hare Krishna the fifth one is
You can experience the taste of spiritual bliss which
is like an ocean which is ever-increasing how much bliss can you
taste as much as you want and more
There is no satiation. There is no limit to the supply of transcendental bliss.
The six Goswamis of Vrindavan, they are glorified by Srinivasa Acharya, that they are blessing the living entities to enable them to taste the ever-increasing ocean of transcendental bliss.
What kind of Sindhu?
What kind of ocean is this?
Bhakti-rasamrta.
Ever-increasing.
That you can taste by chanting Hare Krishna.
Fifth perfection.
Sixth perfection is Purnamrta Svadhanam Pratipadam.
Every step you can taste that nectar for which you are always anxious.
Always you have been wanting.
That's what Prabhupada discussed in this purport.
The whole world is full of hungry living beings.
And the hunger is for spiritual satisfaction.
That hunger can be satisfied by offenselessly chanting Hare Krishna.
Anandam Pratipadam Purnamrta Svadhanam.
Sarvatma Snapanam.
And above all, this chanting of Hare Krishna, Sarvatma Snapanam, it is meant for everyone without exception.
There is no question of whether it will work for me.
There is no question of whether it will work for me.
No.
Sarvatma Snapanam.
It is a universal process.
It is a universal process.
It will work for everyone.
It can satisfy everyone completely.
It will make everyone successful.
Param Vijayate Sri Krishna Sankirtamam.
So these seven perfections of chanting.
Beginning with that, study the verses of the Shastaka.
And you can actually properly study.
Situate yourself to make progress.
To be able to achieve the perfection of serving Krishna only for his satisfaction.
And not serving any material desires.
